theater_description: Legal-source window for SRK shelling/sniping against Sarajevo during the Galić casebook period.
geometry_method_note: Uses citywide inhabitants and confrontation-line totals from the casebook; no front-line micro-geometry reconstruction attempted.
military_area_note: Military exposure proxied by approximately 45,000 ABiH troops inside Sarajevo.
civilian_area_note: Civilian exposure proxied by Sarajevo inhabitants minus the in-city troop count to avoid double-counting.
split_reason: Retains the strongest legal-attribution window for Sarajevo rather than broadening to the full siege.
quality_note: Strong legal findings on civilian targeting and strong exposure inputs, but no source-grounded split of all non-civilian deaths into military vs other.

theater_description: Siege-related deaths and civilian harm in East Mostar during the HVO siege period.
geometry_method_note: Operationalized to East Mostar rather than the wider Mostar municipality; uses siege-period death compilation.
military_area_note: No publishable troop-strength denominator located for East Mostar combatants.
civilian_area_note: Civilian exposure proxied by the documented East Mostar Muslim population (~27,700), not the wider enclave maximum (~51,600).
split_reason: Keeps the existing high-value siege row and adds sourced side attribution only where the source directly names HVO attacks on civilians.
quality_note: Good death compilation and strong civilian-side casualty attribution for one claim, but aggregate death totals lack actor attribution and combatant exposure is missing.

theater_description: Mass execution episode following the fall of Srebrenica.
geometry_method_note: No attempt to reconstruct dispersed execution-site geometry inside this retrofit.
military_area_note: No troop exposure denominator retained for this short execution episode.
civilian_area_note: No stable civilian exposure denominator retained because the victim pool is men and boys removed from the enclave and status is not fully classified.
split_reason: Retains the core Srebrenica mass-killing row with explicit victim- and inflictor-side attribution where the legal source is clear.
quality_note: Very strong legal attribution for the killing episode, but civilian/combatant status remains unresolved at episode-total level and DR is not publishable.

theater_description: Municipality-scale Prijedor victimization window using the demographic expert report.
geometry_method_note: No sub-municipal geometry reconstruction in this retrofit.
civilian_area_note: No civilian exposure denominator retained because only killed-or-missing totals were located, not a matched exposed-population series.
split_reason: Retained as a minimal existing row; side retrofit limited to victim-community labeling because the numeric aggregate is killed-or-missing, not a clean direct-death total.
quality_note: Useful victim-community evidence but not a publishable direct-death DR row.
